pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates gate3_manual_log_20260310.txt specifying EMP018 Time In: 05:55 AM, Time Out: 02:05 PM
setup_task.sh generates gate3_manual_log_20260310.txt specifying EMP019 Time In: 06:00 AM, Time Out: [MISSING], and HR POLICY NOTE requiring 02:00 PM for missing punch-outs
setup_task.sh generates gate3_manual_log_20260310.txt specifying EMP020 Time In: 05:45 AM, Time Out: 02:15 PM
verifier.py expects pass_threshold of 65 to determine success

privileged_info_summary: The task data is synthetic, generated by setup scripts. The incident report on the desktop requires entering attendance records for three employees on March 10, 2026. The employee IDs (EMP018, EMP019, EMP020) and their respective punch-in and punch-out times (including the 02:00 PM default for missing punch-outs per HR policy) are verified by the generated text report. However, there is a discrepancy: the incident report uses the names Marcus Webb, Priya Sharma, and Lucas Fernandez for these IDs, while the underlying Sentrifugo database seed script assigns those IDs to Nicole Anderson, Tyler Moore, and Lauren Jackson. The verifier only checks by employee ID, making the name discrepancy non-fatal to scoring. The passing threshold of 65 is correctly implemented.
